showPinButton.name: Show Pin Indicator
showPinButton.hint: Show a pin icon on pinned messages.

notificationPips.name: Notification Pips
notificationPips.hint: Show unread notification pips on inactive tabs.

tabIC.name: In Character Tab
tabIC.hint: Show a tab for in-character messages.

tabOOC.name: Out of Character Tab
tabOOC.hint: Show a tab for out-of-character messages.

tabRolls.name: Rolls Tab
tabRolls.hint: Show a tab for roll messages.

tabWhispers.name: Whispers Tab
tabWhispers.hint: Show a tab for whispered messages.

debug.name: Enable Debug Mode
debug.hint: Log debug messages to the console.
